jdbcService.sql: select count(id) as total, count(case when state in ('WAITING', 'RUNNING', 'ERROR') then 1 when state = 'CREATED' and :before is not null and scheduled <= :before then 1 else null end) as overlap_total, max(case when state in ('WAITING', 'RUNNING', 'ERROR') then scheduled when state = 'CREATED' and :before is not null and scheduled <= :before then scheduled else null end) as overlap_scheduled from ~tasks where task_schedule_id = :scheduleId and (:scheduled is null or scheduled = :scheduled) and (:states is null or state = any(:states)) and (:queueId is null or task_queue_id = :queueId)
